project_type: Flutter mobile app with FastAPI Python backend
build_system: Flutter pub for frontend, pip/Python for backend. Flutter/Dart not available in sandbox.
test_framework: No tests infrastructure set up yet per RULES.md (tests written after features are stable)
build_command: flutter analyze (not available in sandbox - use AST validation for Python, code review for Dart)
test_command: python3 -m py_compile for Python files. No flutter test available.
verification_instructions: 1. Run python3 -m py_compile on any new/modified Python files. 2. Review Dart files for strict null safety, no dynamic types, proper imports. 3. Ensure no commented-out code, no print statements in Python.
setup_instructions: Python 3.9 available. Flutter/Dart NOT available in sandbox. pip packages not installed (no network for pip install).
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode. Flutter/Dart SDK not installed. Cannot run flutter pub get, flutter analyze, or flutter test. Python 3.9 available but pip packages (fastapi, pydantic) not installed. Use python3 -m py_compile for syntax validation only. Dart code verified by manual review and AST-like checks.
contribution_requirements: Never work on main branch. Strict null safety. No dynamic types. Separate UI from business logic. Services handle API calls. DM Sans body, DM Serif Display headings. Persian Orange #CC5801 used sparingly. No print statements in Python (use logging). Type hints on every Python function. Error handling on every function.
key_patterns: Services extend ApiService (for dio instance with auth interceptor). Widgets use ConsumerStatefulWidget with Riverpod. AppColors for all colors (light + dark mode support via isDark bool). GoogleFonts.dmSans for body, GoogleFonts.dmSerifDisplay for headings. Chat screen has _buildInputBar with plus button, voice widget, and send button in a row.
directory_structure: frontend/lib/core/constants/ - AppColors, AppSizes, AppStrings. frontend/lib/data/services/ - API, auth, chat, voice services. frontend/lib/data/models/ - MessageModel, ChatModel. frontend/lib/presentation/screens/chat/ - chat_screen.dart. frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/chat/ - chat_bubble, voice_input, etc. app/ - FastAPI backend with routers/, middleware/, config.py, main.py.
